name: Harvey Park Farmers Market

Months Open.value: May, June, July, August, September, October

Products.value: Farmers, ranchers, and dairy (vegetables, fruits, flowers, dairy); bakeries (bread, bagels, pastries); specialty foods (cheese, chocolate, pickles, kimchi, nut butters, tortillas, sauces); beverages (coffee, tea, juice); ready-to-eat food (tacos, sandwiches, pupusas, crepes, samosas); cut flowers

Address.value: Kunsmiller Creative Arts Academy (North Parking Lot), 2250 S Quitman Way, Denver, CO 80219

notes: On-file website is live and official; matches the market's own site. Season listed as 'May 2nd through October 31st' (2026 dates shown on site) so mapped to full month names May-October. No phone, email address, ADA accessibility, or certified organic status was clearly stated on the site (only a newsletter signup form was found, no direct email). Address confirmed same street (2250 S Quitman Wy/Way) but site adds venue name Kunsmiller Creative Arts Academy and specifies North Parking Lot.
